page_metadata.biotools__summary: NLProt is a tool for finding protein names in natural language text. This data-mining method is a useful approach for extracting protein UniprotIDs from research articles for the construction of custom datasets and/or databases.
page_metadata.bioschemas__summary: NLProt is a tool for finding protein names in natural language text. This data-mining method is a useful approach for extracting protein UniprotIDs from research articles for the construction of custom datasets and/or databases.
